sn45.28:1.1: At Sāvatthī. "Bhikkhus, I will teach you noble right concentration with its supports and its accessories.Listen to that …
sn45.28:1.2: "And what, bhikkhus, is noble right concentration with its supports and its accessories? There are: right view … right mindfulness. The one-pointedness of mind equipped with these seven factors is called noble right concentration ‘with its supports,’ and also ‘with its accessories.’"
